name: Black Bean
recipeIngredient: Sriracha hot chili sauce -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped onion with the drained black beans.
2. In a food processor, blend the minced garlic, sun-dried tomatoes (oil-packed), wine vinegar, and oil until smooth.
3. Add salt, pepper, and Sriracha hot chili sauce to taste.
4. Combine the blended mixture with the beans.
5. Garnish the salad with real bacon bits and chopped parsley.
Sriracha hot chili sauce is a Vietnamese sauce made by Huy Fong Foods, Inc., located in Rosemead, CA (818-286-8328). It is an excellent all-purpose hot sauce.
